Component.Name: CoNumEdit
Component.Caption: C(CoNumStatic)
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLCos( PROPERTIES(CoNum, Type, Stat, DerCustProspect, DerCustProspectCompany, OrderDate) DISPLAY(1,3,4,5,6)FILTER((Type = 'E')))

Component.Name: CoNumFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: CoNumGridCol
Component.Caption: sEstimate
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLCos( PROPERTIES(CoNum, Type, Stat, CustNum, BillToName, OrderDate) DISPLAY(1,3,4,5,6)FILTER((Type = 'E')))

Component.Name: CustNumEdit
Component.Caption: C(CustNumStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForBillTo(BillToName, , , , , , CurrCode, , , , , Cur0AmtFormat, , , ExportType, BillToCountry, , , P(CustNum))

Component.Name: CustNumGridCol
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForBillTo(BillToName, , , , , , CurrCode, , , , , Cur0AmtFormat, , , ExportType, BillToCountry, , , P(CustNum))

Component.Name: CustomerEdit
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForBillTo(BillToName, , , , , , CurrCode, , , , , Cur0AmtFormat, , , ExportType, BillToCountry, , , P(CustNum))

Component.Name: CustomerFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 13; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 61; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0,0) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: DetailFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 103; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 26; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(ButtonBarVisible) = 1; ANIM: FromRight; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: HeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 19; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0.3,0.625,0.17) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 76; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0.17,0.17) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 3; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 26; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 16fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 84fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: ProspectIDFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 13; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 61; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0,0) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

Component.Name: ShipToFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 13; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 61; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0.25,0,0,0) INDEX(2) TARGET(UNKNOWN2)

EventHandler.Name: CheckFixedRate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.IsFixedSp( PARMS(VAR P(CurrCode), RVAR V(CurrRateIsFixed), MESSAGE, VAR V(Parm_Site)) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CopyConfig
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.CfgCopyConfigSp( PARMS(VAR P(UbSourceConfigID), VAR P(CoNum), VAR 0, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, VAR, MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CurrencyChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.IsFixedSp( PARMS(VAR P(CurrCode), RVAR V(CurrRateIsFixed), MESSAGE, VAR V(Parm_Site)) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CustNumChanged
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_CustNumChanged_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CustNum") <> _ ThisForm.Variables("PrevCustNum").Value _ Then ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollecti
EventHandler.Response2: on.SetCurrentObjectPropertyPlusModifyRefresh( _ "CustSeq", "0") ReturnValue = "0" Else ReturnValue = "-1" End If End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: CustNumChanged
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.CustPriceIncludeTaxSp( PARMS(VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(CustSeq), Rbool P(IncludeTaxInPrice)) )

EventHandler.Name: CustNumOrSeqChanged
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.UpdateExchRateInfoByCustSp( PARMS(VAR P(CustNum), RVAR P(CurAllowOver), RVAR V(CurpAllowOver)) )

EventHandler.Name: CustQuoteWarning_Client_CustNum
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, Prompt, SuccessFailure, mI=ExistFor=1, STRINGS(sEstimate), STRINGS(sCustomerQuote), PV(CustPo), STRINGS(sEstimate), STRINGS(sCustomer), PV(CustNum))

EventHandler.Name: CustQuoteWarning_Client_Prospect
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, Prompt, SuccessFailure, mI=ExistFor=1, STRINGS(sEstimate), STRINGS(sCustomerQuote), PV(CustPo), STRINGS(sEstimate), STRINGS(sProspect), PV(ProspectId))

EventHandler.Name: CustQuoteWarning_DB
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.CustomerQuoteExistsWarningSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CustPo), VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(ProspectId), MESSAGE) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CustSeqChanged
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_CustSeqChanged_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CustSeq") <> _ ThisForm.Variables("PrevCustSeq").Value _ Then ReturnValue = "0" Else
EventHandler.Response2:
ReturnValue = "-1" End If End Sub
End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: EnableDisableConfig
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_EnableDisableConfig_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() ' Enable Menu Option only if Estimate is not New/Updated/Deleted and status <> History ThisForm.Components("ConfigMenuItem").Enabled = _ Application.Variables("Ava
EventHandler.Response2: il_Cfg").Value = "1" And _ ThisForm.CurrentIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("Stat") <> "H" And _ (ThisForm.CurrentIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew = False Or _ ThisForm.CurrentIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectModified = False Or _ ThisForm.CurrentIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectDeleted) End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: GetCustomerInfo
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.EstCustomerValidSp( PARMS(VAR P(CustNum), RVAR P(CustSeq), RVAR P(Contact), RVAR P(Phone), RVAR P(Slsman), RVAR P(Cus0CustType), RVAR P(TermsCode), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(CurrCode), RVAR P(ExchRate), RVAR V(CurrRateIsFixed), RVAR P(UseExchRate), RVAR P(ShipEarly), RVAR P(ShipPartial), RVAR P(ShipCode), RVAR P(FormatBillToAddress), RVAR P(FormatShipToAddress), RVAR P(Cur0AmtFormat), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetProspectInfo
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.EstProspectValidSp( PARMS(VAR P(ProspectId), RVAR P(Slsman), RVAR P(CurrCode), RVAR P(ExchRate), RVAR V(P(CurrRateIsFixed)), RVAR P(PCur0AmtFormat), MESSAGE, RVAR P(FormatBillToAddress), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Phone)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchConfigPcmUI
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.EstimateLinesEstDuePeriodSp( PARMS(VAR, VAR P(CustNum), RVAR V(DefaultDuePeriod), VAR ) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchConfigUI
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.EstimateLinesEstDuePeriodSp( PARMS(VAR, VAR P(CustNum), RVAR V(DefaultDuePeriod), VAR ) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchConfigUI
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.HandleDocumentAutoSp( PARMS(VAR P(ConfigId), VAR P(RowPointer), VAR EST, VAR SyteLineDocument, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) DISABLED() )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchConfigUI
EventHandler.Response: SLCfgMains.HandleDocumentAuto( PARMS(VAR P(ConfigId), VAR P(RowPointer), VAR EST, VAR SyteLineDocument, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchWebConfig
EventHandler.Response: Configuration( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(WebURL=V(WebURL), ApplID=V(ApplID), OrderType=V(OrderType), Key1=V(Key1), Key2=V(Key2), ConfigID=V(ConfigID), Reconfiguration=V(Reconfiguration), JobFlag=V(JobFlag), ApplIDShipSite=V(ApplIDShipSite), ConfigWebUrl=V(ConfigWebUrl), CEP=V(CEP), Job=V(Job), Suffix=V(Suffix), XRefFlag=V(XRefFlag), CfgSource=V(CfgSource), ShipSite=V(ShipSite), AutoJob=V(AutoJob), PartNumber=V(PartNumber), sQty=V(QtyOrderedConv), sUOM=PV(UM), sPartNumber=V(sPartNumber), sP
EventHandler.Response2: arentConfigId=V(sParentConfigId), sNameSpace=V(sNameSpace), sGroupName=V(sGroupName), sCurrencyCode=P(AdrCurrCode), IsPending=V(IsPending), sCoOrigSite=V(sCoOrigSite)) )

EventHandler.Name: msgCustNumChange
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, NoPrompt, SuccessFailure, mE=NoCompare, STRINGS(sCustomer), PV(CustNum))

EventHandler.Name: msgCustNumChange
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(NoClear, Prompt, ReturnAction, mE=IsCompareNot1, STRINGS(sCurrency), VV(PrevCurrCode), STRINGS(sCustomer), STRINGS(sCustomerNum), PV(CustNum))

EventHandler.Name: msgProspectIdChange
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, Prompt, ReturnAction, mE=IsCompareNot1, STRINGS(sCurrency), VV(PrevCurrCode), STRINGS(sProspect), STRINGS(sProspect), PV(ProspectId))

EventHandler.Name: msgStatusChange
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, Prompt, ReturnAction, mQ=IsCompareWillSetForNoYes, STRINGS(sEstimateLine), STRINGS(sEstimate), PV(CoNum), STRINGS(sStatus), @sCoStatus=P(Stat))

EventHandler.Name: RunEstimateLines
EventHandler.Response: EstimateLines( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) RLACS() SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CoTypeDefault=P(Type), EstStatDefault=P(Stat), QuoteDateDefault=P(OrderDate), ShipToDefault=P(CadrName), ExpDateDefault=P(CloseDate), EstCustDefault=P(CustNum), TypeDefault=P(Cus0CustType), CustQuoteDefault=P(CustPo), CurrCodeDefault=P(CurrCode), CostDefault=P(Cost), TotalPriceDefault=P(Price), TermCodeDefault=P(TermsCode), TermDescDefault=P(TermsCodeDesc), Cur0AmtFormatDefault=P(Cur0AmtFormat), Cur0CstPrcFormatDefault=P(Cur0Cst

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLParms.GetSystemParm( PARMS(RVAR V(ExpPeriod), VAR exp_period) ERRORMESSAGE(mValidatorMethodMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted_1 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If Trim(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("CustNum")) = "" _ And Trim(ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("ProspectId")) = "" Then
EventHandler.Response2: ThisForm.Components("CurrCodeEdit").DefaultData() ThisForm.Components("CurrCodeEdit").ValidateData(True) End If End Sub End Class End Namespace )
EventHandler.Description: Display Curr Code if Cust Num is Null

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR Estimates, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: ToggleButtonBar
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ToggleButtonBar_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("0") Else ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Set
EventHandler.Response2: Value("1") End If ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: TranslateToDomestic
EventHandler.Response: EstimatesDomesticCurrency( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CoNum=P(CoNum), Type=P(Type), Stat=P(Stat), OrderDate=P(OrderDate), CloseDate=P(CloseDate), CustNum=P(CustNum), CustSeq=P(CustSeq), CadrName=P(CadrName), CurrCode=P(CurrCode), ExchRate=P(ExchRate), Disc=P(Disc), DiscAmount=P(DiscAmount), MiscCharges=P(MiscCharges), SalesTax=P(SalesTax), SalesTax2=P(SalesTax2), Price=P(Price), Cost=P(Cost), ProspectId=P(ProspectId)) )

EventHandler.Name: UpdateExchangeRate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCos.UpdateOrderExchRateSp( PARMS(VAR P(CurrCode), VAR P(OrderDate), RVAR P(ExchRate), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: VTXCalculateTax
EventHandler.Response: TaxInterfaceParms.SSSVTXCalcCoTaxSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL0EstimateTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL0( OBJ(SLCoitems) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4,5,6,7) OBJNAME(sTree_Estform_RegLine) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CoLine, CoRelease, Item, Description, QtyOrderedConv, DueDate) FILTER(CoNum = FP(CoNum)))

Variable.Name: cds_DSTL1EstimateTree
Variable.Value: LEVEL1( OBJ(SLCoShips) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4,5,6,7) OBJNAME(sTree_COform_RegShip) PROPERTIES(CoNum, CoLine, CoRelease, DateSeq, ShipDate, DerQtyShippedConv, DerQtyReturnedConv) FILTER(CoNum = FP(CoNum) AND CoLine = FV(CoLineVariable)))

Variable.Name: ehm1_CustNumChanged0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR V(ValidCustNum), VAR P(RowPointer), RVAR P(CustNum), RVAR P(CustSeq), RVAR V(ShipmentExists), RVAR P(FormatBillToAddress), RVAR P(FormatShipToAddress), RVAR P(CorpCust), RVAR P(Cad01Name), RVAR P(Cus01Contact_3), RVAR P(Cus01Phone_3), RVAR P(Cad0CorpAddress), RVAR P(CurrCode), RVAR P(UseExchRate), RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(ShipCode), RVAR P(ShipPartial), RVAR P(ShipEarly), RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize), RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(Einvoice), RVAR P(TermsCode), RVAR P(Slsm
Variable.Value2: an), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(EndUserType), RVAR P(ApsPullUp), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(ProcessInd), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: ehm1_CustNumChanged1
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR V(ValidCustNum), VAR P(RowPointer), RVAR P(CustNum), RVAR P(CustSeq), RVAR V(ShipmentExists), RVAR P(FormatBillToAddress), RVAR P(FormatShipToAddress), RVAR P(CorpCust), RVAR P(Cad01Name), RVAR P(Cus01Contact_3), RVAR P(Cus01Phone_3), RVAR P(Cad0CorpAddress), RVAR P(CurrCode), RVAR P(UseExchRate), RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(ShipCode), RVAR P(ShipPartial), RVAR P(ShipEarly), RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize), RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(Einvoice), RVAR P(TermsCode), RVAR P(Slsm
Variable.Value2: an), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(EndUserType), RVAR P(ApsPullUp), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(ProcessInd), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLCos( OBJNAME(oEstimates) FILTERPERM(Type = 'E') ORDERBY(CoNum DESC) UPD(EstSetGloVarSp(UbEstSetLineStat),STD,REF) LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: LeadIdFilterCCVar
Variable.Value: FILTER((CustNum = ISNULL(FP(CustNum), CHAR(1)) OR lead.prospect_id = ISNULL(FP(ProspectId), CHAR(1))) ) SETVARVALUES(DefCustNum = P(CustNum), DefProspectId=P(ProspectId))

Variable.Name: LeadIdFilterPermCCVar
Variable.Value: FILTERPERM((CustNum = ISNULL(FP(CustNum), CHAR(1)) OR lead.prospect_id = ISNULL(FP(ProspectId), CHAR(1))) )

Variable.Name: OppIdFilterCCVar
Variable.Value: FILTER((CustNum = ISNULL(FP(CustNum), CHAR(1)) OR opp.prospect_id = ISNULL(FP(ProspectId), CHAR(1))) AND ISNULL(FP(LeadId), ISNULL(Lead, ' ')) = ISNULL(Lead, ' ') ) SETVARVALUES(DefCustNum = P(CustNum), DefProspectId=P(ProspectId))

Variable.Name: OppIdFilterPermCCVar
Variable.Value: FILTERPERM((CustNum = ISNULL(FP(CustNum), CHAR(1)) OR opp.prospect_id = ISNULL(FP(ProspectId), CHAR(1))) AND ISNULL(FP(LeadId), ISNULL(Lead, ' ')) = ISNULL(Lead, ' ') )

Variable.Name: OppIdFilterVar
Variable.Value: FILTER((FP(CustNum) = CustNum or FP(ProspectId) = ProspectID) and ISNULL(FP(LeadId), ISNULL(Lead, ' ')) = ISNULL(Lead, ' '))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: 'To find Tax System Enabled/Disabled - used to display Tax Amounts labels & components
'To Enable/Disable Tax Code fields - labels, codes, & descriptions
'Tax System 1: Set Tax Code type for Tax System = 1, at
' Line level(Lines, Freight, Misc Charges Tax codes)
'Tax System 2: Set Tax Code type for Tax System = 2, at
' Line level(Lines, Freight, Misc Charges Tax codes)
'Tax System 1: Visible if bTax1Visible is True
'Tax System 1: If Tax code 1 is of Rate Type,
' then it must be non-blank, so make it required
'Tax System 2: Visible if bTax2Visible is True
'Tax System 2: If Tax code 2 is of Rate Type,
' then it must be non-blank, so make it required
'If the Customer Tax Codes were not filled in,
'and Tax Codes are required in Estimates, redefault Tax Codes
'Checking to see if the value is empty before validating so that
'the Tax Code is required message is not generated when the user hits new.
'If OrderDate is blank, set it to today's date
'Since we now have OrderDate, calculate CloseDate
'Set PrevCustNum variable with the expanded value
'This is called after save procedure completes.
'Unbound properties are not refreshed like other properties
'Set form variable to flag refresh if Status is changed
'to "H"istory. History records will be deleted during a
'Refresh collection if the Refresh Flag is set on.
'Clearing the CustSeq when the CustNum changes will tell
'Check for Customer Quote Exists in both unsaved client records
Sub CheckCustQuoteExistsWarning(Optional ByVal strCoNum As String = "")
' If there is no customer PO #, then there is no checking for it needed.
Do While i <= oCache.GetNumEntries - 1 And Not bWarningGiven
ThisForm.Variables("CurrCodePropertiesVar").Value = "CurrCode, CustNum, ExchRate, FixedRate, CurrDescription, AllowCurrateOverride, ParmsAllowCurrateOverride, DerExchRate"
ThisForm.Variables("CurrCodePropertiesVar").Value = "CurrCode, CustNum, ExchRate, FixedRate, CurrDescription, AllowCurrateOverride, ParmsAllowCurrateOverride, DerExchRate"
